proof_boundary: This artifact proves the all-k defect cone, defect monotonicity, exact scaled-defect cone, and scaled-defect growth at lambda=-100. It does not prove the stronger simultaneous lambda=-25,-50,-100 target, PF-infinity, the all-order Jensen bridge, RH, or Lambda <= 0.

rows.claim: Introduce the raw ratio, contraction, defect, and scaled defect.
Full lambda=-100 ratio-cone entry supplies both walls and the adjacent-k wall.
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the existing full ratio-cone theorem at one heat parameter.

rows.claim: The lambda=-100 raw-corridor theorem supplies both adjacent raw-ratio walls.
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the existing all-k raw-corridor theorem at lambda=-100.

rows.claim: The two pointwise cone walls are exactly the required defect bounds.
The adjacent contraction wall is exactly decreasing defect.
rows.proof_boundary: All-k monotone defect bridge at lambda=-100.

rows.claim: Scaling the defect cone gives the exact adaptive scaled-defect cone.
rows.proof_boundary: All-k exact scaled-defect cone at lambda=-100.

rows.claim: The upper raw-corridor wall is exactly increasing scaled defect.
The lambda=-100 theorem discharges the defect-tail and adaptive-defect inputs needed by the one-entry-parameter cone route.
rows.formula: lambda=-100: defect tail closed from k=1; adaptive exact cone and monotone bridge closed from k=1
rows.proof_boundary: The stronger simultaneous theorem at lambda=-25,-50,-100 is not proved and is not needed for the established lambda=-100 entry route.

status: exact interval-analytic adaptive-defect theorem at lambda=-100
